title: Sonzacate Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sonzacate with a Z-Score of +3.34. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Sonzacate has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature is causing a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with a value of 10.7 GG, while the heating degree days (HDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 80% and the wind speed is moderate at 8.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
